data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding emergency contact and pickup authorization controls.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Emergency contact and pickup authorization controls', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for such controls, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any successful creation or verification of these controls. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of emergency contact and pickup authorization controls being validated or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
